3149860.name: Rose - The Mystery of Green Village
3149860.description:
Rose is a Horror game based on survival horror classics featuring puzzles, item rationing, combat and a mysterious story.





November 18, 2005 Green Village.

For more than six months, the population has been suffering from several mysterious disappearances. Adults and children have been disappearing for no reason at all. All of the people who disappeared had no connection whatsoever.

It is suspected that it could be some kind of serial killer or a local gang, but the strangest thing is that no traces or clues have been found as to what might be happening.

Local authorities have already searched the entire area, but their efforts have been in vain.





Enter Michael and Samantha nightmare to find out what happened to them and who this mysterious red-haired girl is.
Classic Horror Survival Combat System.
Unique and charismatic characters.
System of puzzles and rooms.
Detailed characters art and pixel arts.
Songs made exclusively for the game, by the creator himself.
A story full of mysteries and secrets.
3149860.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
